channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pride events face challenges as corporate backing declines
item.description: Corporate support for the LGBTQ+ community has become politically risky, according to a public relations expert.

item.title: Opinion: Pope Leo highlights the importance of our shared humanity
item.description: In his first encyclical, Pope Leo warns about technology and AI, cautioning against the illusions created by AI bots and emphasizing human connection.

item.title: Humpback whale carcass known as Timmy brought ashore in Denmark
item.description: The whale, nicknamed Timmy by German media, died after a controversial rescue attempt. Its body had been drifting near the Danish coast.

item.title: Hegseth calls on Asian leaders to increase military spending against China
item.description: The U.S. defense secretary cited concerns over China's military expansion but also took a more measured stance on bilateral relations.
